Use web-first assertions (expect(locator).toBeVisible()) that auto-retry and produce clear error messages on failure
Configure meaningful timeouts in playwright.config.ts (actionTimeout, navigationTimeout, expect.timeout) rather than per-call overrides
Enable Playwright tracing (trace: 'on-first-retry' or 'retain-on-failure') to capture screenshots, DOM snapshots, and network logs for failed tests
Enable video and screenshot capture on failure (screenshot: 'only-on-failure', video: 'retain-on-failure') for debugging
Use test.fail() to mark known-failing tests explicitly with documentation of expected failure
Use test.skip() or test.fixme() with conditions for environment-dependent or work-in-progress tests
Use expect.soft() for non-critical assertions that should report failures without stopping the test
Configure retries in playwright.config.ts (retries: 2 in CI) to mitigate infrastructure-related flakiness
Add custom error messages to assertions: expect(locator, 'Login button should appear after form submission').toBeVisible()
Use test.info().attach() to attach additional debugging context (API responses, logs) to test reports on failure
Handle expected error dialogs or alerts with page.on('dialog') listeners registered before triggering the action
